logs.msg: Finding 1: The pi-workflows extension is in a complete state — 5/5 tests passing, TypeScript compiles clean, no blockers. The core runtime (VM sandbox, journal, agent/parallel/pipeline) is implemented via pi SDK directly with real token/cost tracking from session.getSessionStats().

Finding 2: P0 — Worktree merge conflict silently loses all changes. The cherry-pick --abort + checkout --theirs handler is a no-op; agent changes are silently discarded on any merge conflict. Fix: use -X theirs on cherry-pick.
